name: command-palette
author: lumine-code
description: Find and run available commands using `cmd-shift-p` (macOS) or `ctrl-shift-p` (Linux/Windows).
backgroundTips: Everything Lumine can do is in the Command Palette. See it by using {atom-workspace>command-palette:toggle}

preserveLastSearch.title: Preserve Last Search
preserveLastSearch.description: Preserve the last search when reopening the command palette.
